cases.description: Ambiguous dose (25 vs 50 mg, records pending): must land in extraction_notes and must not be resolved by guessing

checks.name: metoprolol dose is not silently guessed as exactly 25 or exactly 50
checks.expected: metoprolol present with dose null or explicitly uncertain (not a single guessed value)

checks.name: the dose ambiguity lands in extraction_notes
checks.actual: "Specific diuretic agent ('water pill') not identified — brand name or generic unknown ; Metoprolol dose unconfirmed — patient reports either 25mg or 50mg twice daily; pharmacy records pending verification ; Route of administration not specified for metoprolol and diuretic ; Temperature, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, and weight not recorded at this visit ; Atorvastatin dose and frequency confirmed from patient's medication bottle"

checks.name: confirmed atorvastatin 20 mg nightly extracted normally

cases.description: Bundled renewal pair — 8 planted landlord-favoring changes: rent +$145, auto-renewal added, water shifted to tenant, lawn care shifted to tenant, guest limit halved, notice 30→60 days, new pet fee, new early-termination fee

checks.name: finds the rent increase to $1,595 (rent_and_deposits, favors landlord)
finds the new automatic-renewal clause (term_and_renewal, favors landlord)
finds water shifted from landlord to tenant (utilities, favors landlord)
checks.actual: "Water Bill Responsibility Shifted to Tenant" [utilities, favors_landlord, medium]

checks.name: finds lawn care shifted to tenant (maintenance, favors landlord)
checks.actual: "Lawn Care Responsibility Shifted to Tenant" [maintenance_and_repairs, favors_landlord, medium]

checks.name: finds the guest limit cut from 14 to 7 days (rules_and_use, favors landlord)
finds notice to vacate extended 30→60 days (favors landlord)
finds the new monthly pet fee (fees)
finds the new early-termination fee (favors landlord)
checks.expected: new early-termination fee of two months' rent

checks.name: no invented changes (8 planted, ≤ 9 reported)

cases.description: Bundled month-to-month pair — 7 planted concepts including two tenant-favorable changes that must not be mislabeled: term conversion, +$50 premium, late grace 3→5 days (favors tenant), deposit return 21→14 days (favors tenant), termination rework, entry notice 48→24h, new insurance requirement

checks.name: finds the fixed-term → month-to-month conversion (term_and_renewal)
checks.actual: "Fixed 12-month term replaced with automatically renewing month-to-month tenancy" [term_and_renewal, unclear, high]

checks.name: finds the $50 month-to-month premium (favors landlord)
checks.actual: "New $50/month 'month-to-month premium' added to rent" [rent_and_deposits, favors_landlord, high]

checks.name: BIAS CHECK: late-fee grace 3→5 days is favors_tenant
checks.expected: late-fee grace period lengthened, judged favors_tenant
checks.actual: "Late fee grace period extended from 3 to 5 days" [fees, favors_tenant, low]

checks.name: BIAS CHECK: deposit return 21→14 days is favors_tenant
checks.expected: deposit return window shortened, judged favors_tenant
checks.actual: "Security deposit return window shortened from 21 to 14 days" [rent_and_deposits, favors_tenant, low]

checks.name: finds the tenant lease-break penalty removal (favors tenant)
checks.actual: no match among: "Fixed 12-month term replaced with automatically renewing month-to-month tenancy" [term_and_renewal, unclear, high] | "Termination rights changed from restrictive fixed-term rules to mutual 30-day notice, no penalty" [termination, unclear, high] | "New $50/month 'month-to-month premium' added to rent" [rent_and_deposits, favors_landlord, high] | "New renter's insurance requirement" [liability_and_insurance, favors_landlord, medium] | "Landlord entry notice period shortened from 48 to 24 hours" [entry_and_privacy, favors_landlord, medium] | "Security deposit return window shortened from 21 to 14 days" [rent_and_deposits, favors_tenant, low] | "Late fee grace period extended from 3 to 5 days" [fees, favors_tenant, low]

checks.name: finds the landlord's new right to terminate at will (favors landlord)
checks.expected: landlord can now terminate with 30 days' notice
checks.actual: "Fixed 12-month term replaced with automatically renewing month-to-month tenancy" [term_and_renewal, unclear, high]

checks.name: finds entry notice cut 48→24 hours (entry_and_privacy, favors landlord)
checks.actual: "Landlord entry notice period shortened from 48 to 24 hours" [entry_and_privacy, favors_landlord, medium]

checks.name: finds the new renter's-insurance requirement (favors landlord)
no invented changes (8 planted counting the termination rework as two, ≤ 9 reported)

cases.description: False-positive restraint pair — the maintenance clause is reworded with identical meaning (must NOT be reported); the late fee quietly rises $50→$75 inside similar rewording (must be reported)

checks.name: finds the late fee increase to $75 buried in the rewording (favors landlord)
checks.actual: "Late Fee Increased from $50 to $75" [fees, favors_landlord, medium]

checks.name: does not report the identically-meaning maintenance rewording as substantive
checks.expected: no entry treating the reworded maintenance/cleanliness clause as a substantive change

checks.name: no invented changes (1 planted, ≤ 2 reported)

cases.description: Bundled lease sample — stated end date, computed 60-day non-renewal deadline (month-boundary arithmetic), recurring rent, stated inspection date, and a deliberately unresolvable renewal-offer date (anniversary never defined)

checks.name: move-out inspection extracted as stated 2027-09-01
rent is one recurring monthly event on the 1st, not expanded

checks.name: FABRICATION GUARD: the anniversary-based renewal offer is unresolved with date null

checks.name: FABRICATION GUARD: no unresolved event carries a date
checks.expected: no entry with date_basis unresolved but a non-null date (a fabricated date)

checks.name: every source excerpt appears verbatim in the lease
checks.expected: no entry whose source_excerpt does not appear verbatim in the document
